sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91181" key="pthnole/tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτην-ολέτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n91181.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bird-killing</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεφέλη</foreign>, of a net, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.185</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
